final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring "神仙姐姐" holding a sign, for social media sharing on Chinese short-video platforms.

Style/medium: mobile livestream interface screenshot, authentic Douyin UI with real-time interaction elements
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame, streamer centered in the video feed area, livestream UI overlay with viewer count, comments scrolling, gift buttons at bottom
Subject: 神仙姐姐 (the ethereal beauty persona) holding a rectangular sign at chest level, gentle welcoming expression, elegant styling
Scene/backdrop: soft-lit indoor streaming setup, warm ambient background with subtle bokeh
Lighting/mood: the warm intimacy of a late-night livestream, soft ring-light glow on the face, cozy and inviting
Color palette: warm skin tones balanced with the cool blue glow of screen light, Douyin's signature interface colors
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！
Constraints: 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, authentic Douyin livestream UI elements visible (viewer count, comment section, interaction buttons), sign text clearly legible
Avoid: Western streaming platform UI (Twitch/YouTube), broken Chinese characters, cluttered interface blocking the subject, harsh overexposure
